overview.name: Assert Present - General
overview.description:
This scenario verifies basic present assertion.
Test flow: 1. Navigate to page. 2. Check that element is present. 3. Check that another element is not present.
This scenario validates: - Element presence detection - Negative assertion logic

navigate.comment: Navigate to 'tables page' for apply the 'assert' command

present.comment: Check that element is NOT present
